questions.question: Design a 2-way set-associative cache mapping function for a 64KB cache with 16 sets. What is the size of the cache tag array and the cache set array?
questions.hint: Consider the cache size, number of sets, and the mapping function

questions.question: A 4KB cache has a 2-way set-associative mapping function with a cache size of 16KB. If the cache is currently mapping the following tag references: T0, T1, T2, T3, T5, T7, T8, T11, T13, T15, what is the state of the cache at this point?
questions.hint: Use the given tag references and the 2-way set-associative mapping function

questions.question: Compare the advantages and disadvantages of 2-way, 4-way, and 8-way set-associative mapping functions. How do these mapping functions impact cache performance?
questions.hint: Analyze the trade-offs between cache performance, memory usage, and complexity
